message:
fix(crypto, oauth): constant-time comparison for X25519 shared secret and OAuth state parameter

fcp-crypto/x25519.rs: Replace iterator-based all-zero check on DH
shared secret with subtle::ConstantTimeEq to prevent timing side
channels that could leak information about the shared secret value.

fcp-oauth/oauth2.rs: Replace direct string equality check on OAuth
state parameter with constant-time comparison via subtle::ConstantTimeEq
to prevent timing attacks on the anti-CSRF state token.

fcp-oauth/Cargo.toml: Add subtle dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ tracing.workspace = true
 sha1 = "0.10"
 sha2 = "0.10"
 hmac = "0.12"
+subtle.workspace = true
 base64 = "0.22"
 rand.workspace = true
 url = "2.5"
